subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Akbar! The Lord of Destiny remembereth thee from His Most Great Prison, and giveth thee glad tidings of His grace and bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی اکبر یذکرک مالک القدر فی سجنه الاکبر و یبشرک بفضله و عطائه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @living waters; water of life, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause
